_comment: Pipe (9c) + Weld (9a) overlap: split cube edge 0 (v_0 ↔ v_3) at midpoint, then bevel BOTH resulting collinear halves. The midpoint has selCount=2 valence=2 (weld) AND the two bev edges are collinear (pipe). Expected fail until Weld/Pipe spec cases are implemented in vibe3d/bevel.d — currently vibe3d treats vm as an ordinary bev-endpoint and produces wrong geometry (v_0 and v_3 incorrectly displaced).
